creator: sergey.v.brunov@gmail.com
text:
Hi, Boris!

> It's not released yet -- neither at the site nor at program startup. Let's wait a bit.

Actually, it has been released:

1. [IntelliJ IDEA 2017.3.5 Release Notes - IntelliJ IDEA - Confluence](https://confluence.jetbrains.com/display/IDEADEV/IntelliJ+IDEA+2017.3.5+Release+Notes).
2. [IntelliJ IDEA 2017.3.5: fix for SSH access to GitHub | IntelliJ IDEA Blog](https://blog.jetbrains.com/idea/2018/03/intellij-idea-2017-3-5-fix-for-ssh-access-to-github/).

Best regards,
Sergey Brunov.
